full_text:
Zhang Anshi (Ziru) 張安世 (子孺)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Anshi (張安世), styledZiru (子孺). Zhang Anshi (Western Han) was renowned for intellect and caution; served as President of the Board of War. Zhang Anshi was affiliated with the Western Han Dynasty. Zhang Anshi lived during the Former Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
